message:
🐛 Resolve 16 TODO/FIXME comments: add i18n keys and fix guards (#2538)

- Replace 14 hardcoded English strings with t() translation calls in
  ActiveAlerts.tsx (4 TODOs) and NotificationSettingsSection.tsx (10 TODOs)
- Add new i18n keys to all 9 locale files (cards.json and common.json)
- Fix pct() guard: change falsy !value check to value == null so
  pct(0, total) correctly returns 0 instead of short-circuiting
- Update test expectation for pct(0, 100) to reflect the fix
- Replace GitHubActivity.tsx TODO with descriptive comment

Fixes #2499

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
